import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Search, User, LogIn, LogOut, Shield, Map, Scroll, Filter, Trophy, PlusCircle, Users } from 'lucide-react'; const WoodQuestBoard = () => { const [isLoggedIn, setIsLoggedIn] = useState(false); const [quests] = useState([ { id: 1, author: "Geralt_of_Rivia", title: "Griffin Menace at White Orchard", reward: "500 Gold", difficulty: "Medium", rotation: "-1deg" }, { id: 2, author: "Link_HY", title: "Collect 500 Rupees for Shield Repair", reward: "Hylian Shield", difficulty: "Easy", rotation: "2deg" }, { id: 3, author: "Cloud_S", title: "Mako Reactor Maintenance", reward: "2000 Gil", difficulty: "Hard", rotation: "-2deg" }, { id: 4, author: "Arthur_M", title: "Train Robbery Assistance", reward: "150 Gold", difficulty: "Medium", rotation: "1.5deg" }, { id: 5, author: "Slayer_G", title: "Goblin Den Clearing", reward: "Small Pouch", difficulty: "Easy", rotation: "-1.2deg" }, ]); return (
